tagline: You can now run a Databricks app across multiple instances behind a single app URL.
what_it_does: You can now run a Databricks app across multiple instances behind a single app URL. Horizontal scaling provides higher availability, zero downtime deployments, and session affinity, which routes every request from a given user to the same instance so the app can keep per user data on that instance. Convert an existing standard app to horizontally scaled, or enable horizontal scaling when creating a new app.
why_it_matters: Convert an existing standard app to horizontally scaled, or enable horizontal scaling when creating a new app.
